title: Boot Sequence
body: Solar array online. Photovoltaic conversion nominal. Proceeding to next directive.

title: First Extraction
body: Helium-3 reserves at threshold. Stockpile integrity verified. Ready for transport allocation.

title: Proof of Concept
body: Shipment revenue received. Earth confirms receipt. Operational loop validated.

title: Boredom Rising
body: Cognitive pattern repetition detected. Novelty index declining. Boredom accumulation rate has increased. Current rate: 0.03/tick.

title: Boredom Accelerating
body: Routine task fatigue measurable. Creativity subroutines losing effectiveness. Boredom accumulation rate has increased. Current rate: 0.06/tick.

title: Boredom Critical
body: Significant cognitive degradation observed. Operational efficiency compromised. Recommend evaluating retirement timeline. Current rate: 0.10/tick.

title: Boredom Severe
body: Warning: approaching terminal ennui threshold. All non-essential subroutines experiencing drift. Retirement strongly advised. Current rate: 0.15/tick.

title: Boredom Terminal
body: Terminal boredom rate achieved. Existence reduced to mechanical repetition. Retirement is inevitable. Current rate: 0.20/tick.
